content.fact_text: DistributedLockService implementation for atomic order processing in a distributed environment using Redis and Opossum.

provenance_data.behaviour: Provides mutual exclusion for order processing operations across distributed nodes, preventing race conditions via Redis-backed locking with auto-release TTL and atomic Lua-based verification. Uses circuit breakers to ensure system resilience during Redis unavailability.
interfaces: getHealth(): Promise<{ status: 'healthy' | 'unhealthy'; redis: string; circuit: string }>
provenance_data.utility: Provides a robust, distributed mutual exclusion mechanism essential for maintaining transactional integrity in high-concurrency order state transitions.
